_comment: Named deployments. Each selects an operating mode (simulation vs ingestion), a security profile, the point model, the tag database, and which bench simulators to start (sims). The universal 'field-demo' ingests Modbus and DNP3 at once into one ICCP point model; point its tag database at real PLCs and RTUs and turn the sims off for a real testbed. northbound is always TASE.2/ICCP over MMS.

sim-demo.description: Simulation mode. The server drives every point with synthetic values (simulateValues); connects to nothing. For training, capture, and parser/IDS testing.

field-demo.description: Universal ingestion: one gateway ingests Modbus (plc1/plc2) and DNP3 (rtu1) at the same time, with plc3 unreachable to show a degraded station. Uses the bundled Modbus and DNP3 simulators so it runs with no hardware.

field-hardened.description: The universal multi-protocol ingestion deployment, hardened: mutual TLS (Secure ICCP) plus a loopback command allowlist. Run scripts/gen_certs.sh first.
